task_description: Implement foundational Sleep Audio Pipeline infrastructure: S3 Input/Output buckets with encryption and versioning, and an EventBridge rule triggered on object creation in the input bucket. Follow strict TDD methodology.

verification.summary: All 7 tests pass (TestCdkBaseStack, TestInputBucketExists, TestOutputBucketExists, TestBucketsHaveBlockPublicAccess, TestEventBridgeRuleExists, TestEventBridgeRuleHasTarget, TestPlaceholderLambdaExists). cdk synth succeeds. Tests verify actual CloudFormation resource properties and would fail if implementation code were reverted.
